scripts.test:torque:proof: vitest run tests/meridian_client_marketplace_flow.test.ts tests/reward_target_store.test.ts tests/torque_reward_policy.test.ts tests/torque_event_service.test.ts tests/torque_runbook_docs_lock.test.ts
scripts.test:pipeline:critical: vitest run tests/deal_pipeline_phase1.test.ts tests/settlement_address_service.test.ts tests/stealth_settlement_service.test.ts tests/umbra_settlement_v2.test.ts tests/stealth_settlement_lifecycle_service.test.ts tests/legacy_umbra_stealth_lifecycle.test.ts tests/magicblock_settlement_deprecated.test.ts tests/pipeline_recovery_service.test.ts tests/escrow_listener_integration.test.ts tests/rollup_listener_integration.test.ts
scripts.test:prod:stack: npm run typecheck && npm run test:pipeline:critical && npm run test:component:e2e && npm run test:rollup:live
scripts.test:prod:harnessed-full: npm run test:prod:stack && npm run test:diagram:live
scripts.test:prod:full: echo 'Deprecated: test:prod:full is a harness-backed downstream proof only. Use test:prod:harnessed-full or test:phase8:gate.' >&2 && npm run test:prod:harnessed-full
scripts.test:prod:stability: npm run typecheck && npm run test:pipeline:critical && npm run test:diagram:soak
scripts.test:phase7:proof: npm run test:per:strict:e2e && npm run test:marketplace:per:proof
scripts.test:phase8:gate: npm --prefix ../api-server run typecheck && npm run typecheck && npm run test:pipeline:critical && npm run test:phase7:proof && npm run test:per:strict:live && npm run test:diagram:soak
